content.en:
The next moment.

Ye Tian once again unleashed the Remnant Demon Blade, a fragmented version of the Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, once again penetrating the body of the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon.

At this moment, the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon was also afraid, he knew very well that he should not be able to kill Ye Tian, and he might even be killed by Ye Tian's remnant demon blade.

The Demon Blade is a crippled version of the Extreme Ultimate Arcane, and the damage caused by this Ultimate Arcane cannot be recovered from in a short period of time, and if the injury is serious, he will be in danger.

"Run!"

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon quickly fled, and Ye Tian didn't chase after him, his strength was still too reluctant to kill a peak Ancient Demon level powerhouse.

Even if he really killed the Golden Slayer Ancient Demon, his true body would probably be scrapped, and he couldn't directly copy the top-level Ancient Demon level copy body, so he had to re-cultivate, which would be a waste of time.

Therefore, Ye Tian gave up chasing and killing the Golden Exterminator Ancient Demon.

......

"Damn, the sky is so powerful, his current strength is not inferior to mine, if he waits for him to go further, he doesn't even need to burst 04 to the peak of the ancient demon level powerhouse, I am far inferior to him. "

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon knew that he had no hope of killing Ye Tian, what should he do in the future when Ye Tian grew up?

Either they defect to other top tribes, but there are not necessarily the top who are willing to take them in, or they are completely loyal to the main department of the Arrow Mother and fight for the main department of the Arrow Mother, but they may not necessarily be valued by the main department of the Arrow Mother.

"Let's take a look step by step, if you really reach a desperate situation, it's a big deal to escape into other space-time bubbles and take refuge in other main departments. "

The Golden Slayer Ancient Demon thought to himself.

Time passes slowly.

In the following years, Ye Tian found a lot of resources and gained more and more.

However, he still hasn't found the Nightmare Rama flower.

As a result, he began to go deep into the realm of mortality, and occasionally encountered other peak ancient demon-level powerhouses, but he would avoid them in advance and not contact them.

this day.

Ye Tian suddenly sensed an attraction, which came from the attraction of copying talent.

"This ......"

Ye Tian was excited.

His copying talent hadn't evolved for countless years, but now in the Realm of Friction, he had encountered a treasure that could make the copying talent evolve.

If the replication talent evolves, he should be able to directly copy a top-level ancient demon-level replication body.

Although even if the copying talent evolves, when he returns to his era, the copying talent will return to its original form, but at least in this era, his copying talent will be of great help.

Immediately, Ye Tian cautiously shuttled through the induction.

Soon after, he came to an area where he sensed a black boulder that attracted his talent for replication.

Immediately, he took the black boulder away, and then quickly left, coming to a remote place in the realm of Destruction with few resources.

Here he began to study the black monolith.

Immediately afterward, he sensed a strange particle energy from the black boulder.

Then, he began to extract this substance.

Gradually, the black monolith was turned into powder, from which a black liquid was extracted.

Then, he swallowed the black liquid in one gulp, and the energy of the black liquid poured into the copy talent.

In an instant, he seemed to see the copying talent turn into an ultimate particle combination, and the black liquid was perfecting this ultimate particle combination, making the copying talent into the most perfect form.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's copying talent has finally been transformed, and the copying talent imprint has become a talent ball.

And this talent ball is not a simple spherical talent, but is made of hundreds of millions of ultimate particle diagrams, and has become a copy talent ball like this.

It seems to have evolved to its final form, becoming the most perfect and extreme copy talent.

Immediately, as soon as his mind moved, there was an additional copy body next to him, and his cultivation was also a top Gu Demon-level powerhouse realm.

"Sure enough, I can now directly copy the top-level Ancient Demon-level copy body, breaking the rules and restrictions. "

Ye Tian was very excited.

Not only that, but the enveloping range of the copying talent has been expanded tenfold, and the other abilities have also become stronger.

In this way, he is not afraid of replicating the fall of the body, otherwise he will really easily fall from this era and die.

However, he is more curious about the copy talent ball, if he studies this copy talent ball thoroughly, and understands the mystery of the copy talent, even if he returns to his own era, he may be able to let the copy talent transform on its own.

Of course, this will take a long time of research, and it will certainly not be possible in a short period of time.

So, he didn't study here, but began to find more resources in the Realm of Mortality.

Wow!

Ye Tian's several replica bodies were looking for resources in the Realm of Friction, and they were all separated, in different territories, so that a peak ancient demon-level powerhouse would not find several replica bodies at the same time, and it would not be easy to be exposed.

Over time, he gained more and more resources.

And this day.

Ye Tian's luck was outrageous, and he actually found a Nightmare Rama flower, which grew quietly in a valley.

Ye Tian directly took this Nightmare Rama Flower, and he was very excited.

In the years that followed, there were a lot fewer resources here, and it was not easy to find the precious 793 things.

After all, the resources of the Friction Realm are not innumerable, there are just so many, there are many peak ancient demon-level powerhouses and top-level ancient demon-level powerhouses who have poured in, and after a long time, the resources have been looted.

Of course, after they go out, they will wait for countless ancient demon eras, and a lot of resources will be born in the realm of Mortality.

......

"This is the Stone of Destruction!"

Ye Tian looked at the Killing Stone in his hand and smiled, he didn't deliberately look for the Killing Stone before, but he didn't expect that he was about to leave the Friction Realm, and he actually found a brand new Killing Stone.

This piece of Friction Stone can allow him to enter the Friction Realm three times, and its value is not low.

Of course, at that time, he may not necessarily enter the Realm of Destruction again, maybe by then, he will have already broken through to the ultimate ancient demon level!

Some more years have passed.

The realm of the Destruction is about to close, and it has to be done at this time, otherwise the next countless years will be locked in the Realm of the Destruction, and if you don't go out, you will be pulled into the depths of the endless space-time line, and thus fall.

This is also the result of the previous experiments, no peak Ancient Demon-level powerhouse and top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouse dare to stay in the realm of Friction.

Whew!!

A peak ancient demon-level powerhouse and a top-level ancient demon-level powerhouse have come out of the realm of friction.
